judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes fresh air, but it omits two required immediate actions: assist breathing if needed and call a doctor/poison control immediately. It also adds unsupported and wrong-incident advice (rinse mouth/nose; do not induce vomiting), and weakens escalation by making it conditional on worsening symptoms.
